title: thalictrum minus subsp. subcuneatum
intro: Thalictrum minus subsp. subcuneatum, also known as the meadow rue, is a type of flowering plant in the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae) native to Europe. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Thalictrum minus subsp. subcuneatum include its ability to boost the immune system and reduce fever, as well as its use as an antihistamine to alleviate symptoms of allergies. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
